title: Integration test env vars fall back to 'my-project'/'my-secret' when unset
description: When SECRETX_GCP_TEST=1 is set but GCP_PROJECT or GCP_SECRET_NAME are not, the integration tests silently fall back to 'my-project' and 'my-secret'. The test then fails with a confusing GCP HTTP error about a non-existent project rather than a clear 'set GCP_PROJECT and GCP_SECRET_NAME' message. A user who sets the gate var but forgets the others wastes time debugging a misleading error. Fix: if SECRETX_GCP_TEST=1 and GCP_PROJECT/GCP_SECRET_NAME are absent, panic with an explicit message naming the missing variables.
